outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility near gamma flip; positive GEX stabilizes market. Expect pinning behavior around 650 strike.
outlook.summary: Market positioned at critical harmonic resonance (650) across all expirations. Positive GEX (1.66B total) suppresses volatility. Extreme put bias (PCR 3.99 monthly) suggests contrarian bullish setup. Max Pain cluster 645-655 creates magnetic zone. Smirk skew in 0DTE indicates hedging pressure. Dealers long gamma will suppress moves, favoring mean reversion strategies.

levels.motivazione: EXACT strike alignment across ALL 3 expirations (0DTE: 650.36, WEEKLY: 650.0, MONTHLY: 650.06). Spot 650.34 sits directly on this harmonic node. Combined OI: 32,892 CALL + 78,513 PUT. Dealers will actively pin price here.
Massive PUT OI confluence: WEEKLY 127,255 + MONTHLY 120,743 = 247,998 contracts. High VOL/OI ratio (0.5 weekly) indicates active positioning. 3.1% below spot. Extreme PCR validates support strength.
0DTE Max Pain level 0.82% below spot. High PUT VOL (53,864) vs OI (19,834) = 2.7x ratio indicates unusual activity. 0DTE gamma attraction active into close.
Confluent PUT OI: 0DTE 13,942 + MONTHLY 105,547. Extremely high 0DTE VOL (84,839) = 6.1x OI ratio signals heavy hedging. Bearish smirk skew (1.26) validates support.
Dominant CALL OI cluster: 0DTE 14,389 + WEEKLY 16,731 + MONTHLY 11,161. Combined with PUT OI creates friction zone. 1.5% above spot. Monthly Max Pain at 665 nearby.
Weekly Max Pain 0.71% above spot. Moderate CALL OI (4,425) with PUT presence (26,377). Neutral skew in weekly suggests balanced positioning. Target for week's expiry.
Significant PUT OI: WEEKLY 11,910 + MONTHLY 111,157 = 123,067 contracts. Deep support at 3.9% below spot. High monthly VOL (96,851) shows active positioning.
Monthly CALL WALL with 21,067 OI. 4.5% above spot. Limited near-term relevance but marks upper boundary of dealer hedging zone.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; positive GEX suppresses movement near gamma flip
outlook.summary: Spot pinned at multi-expiry gamma flip (577). Positive total GEX (1.34B) indicates dealers long gamma, suppressing volatility. Max pain trajectory points toward 584-591 zone. Flat skew and neutral PCR suggest balanced market awaiting directional catalyst.

levels.motivazione: CRITICAL: Gamma flip aligns exactly at 577 in both WEEKLY and MONTHLY expirations. Spot at 577.18 is pinned at this structural inflection point where dealer hedaging behavior shifts.
Dominant 0DTE call resistance with 9,485 OI and 19,854 volume. Primary upside barrier for intraday movement. Volume/OI ratio 2.09 indicates active positioning.
MAJOR structural support: 0DTE shows 13,514 CALL OI + 7,394 PUT OI (20,908 total interest). MONTHLY has 39,296 PUT OI. Multi-expiry support zone with dealer defense likely.
0DTE max pain level 1.0% below spot. Market maker target for option value minimization. Acts as gravitational pull for intraday price action.
Deep support with 16,261 OI (0DTE) + 31,168 OI (MONTHLY). High volume 49,961 confirms active interest. Structural floor for the structure.
MAJOR MONTHLY resistance with 39,835 CALL OI - largest single-strike open interest. Ultimate upside cap for the expiration cycle.
WEEKLY max pain aligns near resistance zone. Combined with MONTHLY max pain at 591, indicates upward dealer target trajectory over time.
Intraday gamma inflection point. Spot below this level means dealers may sell into weakness. Break above converts to support.
0DTE CALL OI 7,681 + WEEKLY PUT OI 6,820 + MONTHLY PUT OI 30,992. Conflicting interest creates price friction and potential chop.
